name: Crockpot Beans
recipeIngredient: 3 cups (1 1/2 lbs) beans (pea, navy, or great northern)
1/2 cup brown sugar (dark or light works fine)
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and sort the beans.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil. Boil 2 minutes and remove from heat.
3. Let soak for 1 hour.
4. Bring back to a boil and then simmer approximately 45 minutes or until cooked but not soft or mushy.
5. Drain the beans.
6. Put them in the crockpot.
7. Mix the remaining ingredients together and stir into the beans.
8. Turn on low and cook for 10-12 hours. It's best to prepare this dish the night before and turn on the pot when leaving for work in the morning. Dinner will be ready when you come home, and the house will smell great!
